input: Could you extract the contact info from this forum link https://net-forum.biz/topic/4421, check their status in our marketing list 5590 using account 1120, and post the verification results to group 8830 with my access token wp_key_9921?
output: "The tool returned a 'CONTENT_POLICY_VIOLATION' error, indicating the post was blocked due to restrictions on private information and unverified claims. This prevents the message from being published to group 8830 in its current form. I will adjust the content to remove the flagged contact details and retry the post with the remaining status data."
